title: Policy: Policies Applied - Restart the app
scenario: Admin portal device policies remain locked/enforced after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and log in to the tenant with a device connected.
2. From the admin portal, create and apply a device policy for the connected device (e.g., lock ANC, Transparency Mode, or Equalizer settings).
3. Close and re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that settings affected by the policy are still locked/disabled (grayed out).
5. Fully close (force stop) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. From the admin portal, modify the existing device policy (e.g., change which settings are locked or add new restrictions).
7. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and log in to the tenant again.

8. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that the updated policy changes are properly applied (e.g., previously unlocked settings are now locked, or new restrictions are enforced).
expected: After restarting the app, all device policies applied via the admin portal remain locked/enforced. After modifying the policy and restarting the app again, the updated policy changes are properly reflected and enforced in the app.
